name: @harness/web-shared
description: ISSUE-087 substrate core — the skin-swappable design system + the load-bearing substrate logic every surface reuses: design tokens (CSS variables, the swappable skin), the RBAC-driven nav gate (reuses @harness/rbac's can()/nodes — no second source of truth, AF-080 spirit), the honest-state view-state logic (never-false-healthy, NFR-OBS.011), the answer-mode-pill seam (NFR-OBS.012), and the typed data-access seam surfaces call the app/* packages through. Pure-logic core is proven with tsx --test exactly like every other app/* package; the React components are thin token-only renderers over that logic.
